name: 28" Round Metal Mirror Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a touch of elegant charm to your home aesthetics with this Round Metal Mirror from Room Essentials™. This wall mirror features a metal frame in black to bring minimalist vibes to your space. It's designed in a round shape and features a wall-mount style for easy installation. Perfectly sized to balance function and style, this mirror instantly uplifts interiors with its artisanal appeal.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
